reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion.. un lugar en excelente condiciones y el personal muy amable. Baños habilitados y limpios. Falta aplicacion de pago QR que en general hay en los ACA pero todo perfecto

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The place is in great condition and the staff is very friendly. The restrooms are clean and functional. They're missing the QR payment app that's generally available at ACA locations, but everything else is perfect.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcjlEUXNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La única estación de servicio antes de Quilino, 200km para cargar nafta después. Carga ahí o fuiste. Si venís de Córdoba te salva las papas, porque hasta Catamarca Capital tampoco hay.

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station before Quilino, 200km further on. Fill up there or you're done for. If you're coming from Córdoba, it's a lifesaver, because there aren't any until Catamarca Capital either.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMDdHNThRRRAB
